products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun: Rice + Probiotics
products.description: A lightweight and creamy organic sunscreen that's comfortable on the skin. Containing 30% rice extract and grain fermented extracts, it provides moisture and nourishment to the skin.
products.usageInstructions: At the last step of skincare routine, evenly spread a generous amount over areas vulnerable to sun exposure.

products.name: Anua Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner
products.description: A highly concentrated Heartleaf toner that soothes skin troubles and provides intense hydration. Perfect for sensitive and acne-prone skin.
products.usageInstructions: After cleansing, apply a moderate amount over the face and pat lightly for better absorption.

products.name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Light Cleansing Oil
products.description: An all-in-one non-irritating cleansing oil that melts away all traces of makeup and impurities comfortably. Infused with MCT oil-extracted Centella Asiatica from Madagascar.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a few pumps onto dry face with dry hands. Gently massage in circular motions. Emulsify with water and rinse thoroughly.

products.name: CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser
products.description: A salicylic acid cleanser enhanced with barrier-restoring ingredients like ceramides. It gently exfoliates while maintaining the skin's natural barrier.
products.usageInstructions: Massage cleanser onto wet skin. Rinse. Avoid direct contact with eyes.

products.name: Topicals Faded Brightening & Clearing Serum
products.description: A hyperpigmentation-safe serum that visibly brightens the skin and fades stubborn dark spots, scars, and marks.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a thin, even layer onto cleansed, dry skin. Start with 1-2 times a week and increase as tolerated.

products.name: The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
products.description: A 7% Glycolic Acid Toning Solution offers mild exfoliation for improved skin radiance and visible clarity. It also improves the appearance of skin texture with continued use.
products.usageInstructions: Use ideally in the PM, no more than once daily. After cleaning, saturate a cotton pad and sweep across face and neck. Avoid eye contour.

products.name: Mixsoon Bean Cream
products.description: A thick, highly concentrated cream containing fermented bean, pear, and pomegranate extracts to deeply nourish and hydrate the skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply an appropriate amount at the last step of your skincare routine. Gently tap for absorption.

products.name: Bioré UV Aqua Rich Watery Essence
products.description: A world-famous Japanese sunscreen with a unique watery texture that absorbs instantly into the skin without feeling sticky or greasy.
products.usageInstructions: Apply evenly to the face and body before sun exposure. Reapply after sweating or swimming.

products.name: AmLactin Daily Nourish 12% Lactic Acid Lotion
products.description: A daily moisturizing lotion that contains 12% Lactic Acid (AHA) to gently exfoliate and deeply hydrate rough, dry skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply twice daily or as directed by a physician. Mild stinging or irritation may occur on sensitive or broken skin.

products.name: PanOxyl Acne Foaming Wash
products.description: A maximum strength antimicrobial wash that kills acne-causing bacteria on contact and lifts dirt from pores for a fresher, clearer you.
products.usageInstructions: Wet area to be cleansed. Apply acne wash and gently massage area for 1-2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly and pat dry.

products.name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule
products.description: An intensive brightening ampoule that cares for hyperpigmentation and uneven skin tone with patented MadeWhite ingredients encapsulated for stability.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a few drops after toner. Pat gently into the skin.

products.name: Dr. Althea 345 Relief Cream
products.description: A nutrient-rich ointment-type cream that cares for sensitive skin and helps to fade post-breakout marks with its intensive soothing formula.
products.usageInstructions: After serum, apply a proper amount to the face and gently massage until absorbed.

products.name: Dr. Althea 147 Barrier Cream
products.description: A moisture-rich cream designed to provide deep hydration and strengthen the skin's moisture barrier using Azulene and Ceramides.
products.usageInstructions: Apply as the final step in your routine. Ideal for night use for a deep barrier reset.

products.name: CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum
products.description: Help reduce the appearance of post-acne marks and pores while restoring the skin barrier with encapsulated retinol and licorice root extract.
products.usageInstructions: Apply evenly to face daily in the PM. If discomfort occur during first application, space out applications until skin adjusts.

products.name: CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser
products.description: A gentle face wash with ingredients like ceramides and hyaluronic acid that work to restore the skin’s natural barrier to help the skin lock in moisture.
products.usageInstructions: Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse.

products.name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: A unique formula with three essential ceramides that cleanses and removes oil without disrupting the protective skin barrier.
products.usageInstructions: Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Revive Eye Serum: Ginseng + Retinal
products.description: An eye serum that helps to improve wrinkles on the sensitive skin around the eyes by combining ginseng extract and retinal.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a small amount around the eyes and tap gently with finger tips.

products.name: Medicube Collagen Night Wrapping Mask
products.description: A jelly-type sleeping mask that wraps your skin in collagen overnight to wake up with visibly firmer, glass-like skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply as the very last step in your evening routine. Let it dry and sleep. Peel off or rinse in the morning.

products.name: CeraVe Skin Renewing Vitamin C Serum
products.description: Formulated with 10% pure vitamin C (L-ascorbic acid) to help visibly brighten your complexion and support soft, radiant, and healthy-looking skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply evenly to face and neck daily. Avoid eye area and contact with lips. Apply sunscreen after in the morning.

products.name: Kojie San Kojic Acid Soap
products.description: The original Kojic Acid lightening soap. It targets dark spots, freckles, and other skin pigmentations for a brighter, more even tone.
products.usageInstructions: Lather soap and apply to treatment areas. Leave the soap on for up to 30 seconds. Rinse with cold water.

products.name: Dr. Meinaier Coconut Lime Sugar Scrub
products.description: A refreshing body scrub that uses sugar crystals to physically exfoliate dead skin cells while coconut and lime extracts leave skin smelling tropical and feeling soft.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a generous amount to damp skin. Massage in circular motions. Rinse thoroughly. Use 2-3 times a week.

products.name: Disaar Aloe Vera 99% Soothing & Moisturizing Gel
products.description: Multi-purpose 99% Aloe Vera gel that provides cooling relief, intense hydration, and soothing care for irritated or dry skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply frequently to face, body, or hair as needed for soothing and hydrating effects.

products.name: Pei Mei Retinol C Serum
products.description: A potent blend of Retinol and Vitamin C designed to target signs of aging while brightening the overall complexion and improving skin elasticity.
products.usageInstructions: Apply a few drops to cleansed skin in the PM. Follow with moisturizer. Always use SPF during the day.

products.name: Pei Mei TCM Scar and Acne Mark Removal Gel
products.description: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) inspired gel designed to penetrate the cortex and soften scar tissue, promoting natural renewal and healing of post-acne marks.
products.usageInstructions: Apply to the scar area 2-3 times a day. Massage gently until skin absorbs the gel.

products.name: Dragon Fruit Sugar Scrub
products.description: A vibrant, antioxidant-rich sugar scrub featuring dragon fruit extract to exfoliate and brighten the skin's appearance on the body.
products.usageInstructions: Massage onto damp skin in circular motions. Rinse with warm water. Gentle enough for weekly use.

products.name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tea-Trica BHA Foam
products.description: A deep-cleansing foam formulated for acne-prone skin, combining BHA (Salicylic Acid) with Pine Tree complex and Tea Tree leaf water to soothe and clear skin.
products.usageInstructions: Lather with water and massage onto face. Rinse with lukewarm water.

products.name: Disaar Vitamin C Peeling Lotion
products.description: A brightening body lotion that promotes gentle peeling and skin renewal, leaving the body smooth and glowing with the power of Vitamin C.
products.usageInstructions: Apply evenly to the body, especially rough areas like elbows and knees. Use consistently for brightening results.

products.name: BIOAQUA Rice Raw Pulp Moisturizing 6-Piece Set
products.description: A complete skincare regimen infused with rice raw pulp to hydrate, brighten, and smooth the skin. Includes cleanser, toner, serum, lotion, cream, and eye cream.
products.usageInstructions: Follow the sequence: Cleanser -> Toner -> Serum -> Lotion -> Eye Cream -> Face Cream.

products.name: Hoygi BHA 2% Gentle Exfoliating Toner
products.description: A specialized toner with 2% BHA (Salicylic Acid) that penetrates deep into pores to dissolve oil and debris while soothing the skin surface.
products.usageInstructions: Apply with a cotton pad to treatment areas in the evening. Avoid using with other strong actives.

products.name: Dr. Rashel Vitamin C Brightening & Anti-Aging Series
products.description: Complete gift set containing high-concentration Vitamin C products to fight aging, brighten complexion, and protect against environmental damage.
products.usageInstructions: Use the daily set for morning and night routine to achieve maximum brightening results.

products.name: Aichun Beauty Collagen & Snail Deep Cleansing Whitening Cream
products.description: Multi-effect facial cream with snail secretion filtrate and collagen to help repair, brighten, and firm the skin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply to clean face twice daily. Massage gently until absorbed. Use sunscreen during the day.

products.name: CeraVe SA Body Wash for Rough & Bumpy Skin
products.description: A salicylic acid body wash that provides gentle, non-irritating exfoliation and helps to smooth the skin's surface while restoring the protective barrier.
products.usageInstructions: Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse.

products.name: CeraVe Hydrating Body Wash
products.description: Cleanses and moisturizes effectively with a non-foaming formula that helps restore the skin’s natural protective barrier with ceramides.
products.usageInstructions: Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage into skin. Rinse. Non-foaming formula does not strip moisture.

products.name: Disaar Beauty Skincare Whitening Soap
products.description: A gentle whitening soap enriched with plant extracts to help fade dark spots and even out skin tone on both face and body.
products.usageInstructions: Wet skin and lather soap. Apply to face or body and rinse after 1-2 minutes.

products.name: Disaar Aloe Vera & Argan Body Oil Gel
products.description: An intensive moisturizing body oil gel that provides the richness of oil with the lightness of a gel. Locks in moisture for up to 24 hours.
products.usageInstructions: Apply immediately after showering to damp skin for maximum absorption and hydration.

products.name: CeraVe Eczema Soothing Body Cream
products.description: Specifically formulated to temporarily protect and help relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to eczema.
products.usageInstructions: Apply to affected areas as needed or twice daily. Suitable for adults and children over 2 years.

products.name: Dr. Meiner Shea Butter Body Scrub
products.description: A ultra-moisturizing body scrub that combines the power of raw shea butter with natural exfoliants to repair and soften very dry skin.
products.usageInstructions: Massage onto damp skin, focusing on dry patches like heels and elbows. Rinse for extremely soft skin.

products.name: CeraVe Daily Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: A lightweight, oil-free moisturizer that helps hydrate the skin and restore its natural barrier with three essential ceramides.
products.usageInstructions: Apply liberally as often as needed, or as directed by a physician.

products.name: SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Poremizin Quick Stick Mask
products.description: An easy-to-use stick-type mask that pulls out sebum and impurities from pores while soothing the skin with Pink Salt and Centella.
products.usageInstructions: Apply onto dry face after cleansing. Leave on for 5-10 minutes and rinse with water. Avoid eye area.

products.name: Cetaphil Moisturizing Cream
products.description: Rich, non-greasy cream specfically formulated with a new and improved formula containing a dermatologist-backed blend of niacinamide, panthenol, and hydrating glycerin.
products.usageInstructions: Apply liberally to the body and face to hydrate and protect very dry, sensitive skin.

products.name: Collagen Deep Cleansing Snail Face Serum
products.description: A revitalizing face serum with snail mucin and collagen to promote skin elasticity, hydration, and a smoother texture.
products.usageInstructions: Apply 2-3 drops after toner and before moisturizer for a plump, healthy glow.

products.name: Dr. Meinaier Vitamin C Sugar Scrub
products.description: Brightening body scrub with Vitamin C and sugar crystals to polish away dull skin and reveal a luminous, smooth surface.
products.usageInstructions: Apply to wet skin in circular motions. Rinse. Use 2-3 times weekly.

products.name: Dr. Meiner AHA Sugar Scrub
products.description: Combines physical sugar exfoliation with the chemical power of AHA to target stubborn bumps and rough skin texture.
products.usageInstructions: Use on targeted areas like arms and legs. Massage gently and rinse. Use SPF on areas treated.

products.name: CeraVe SA Body Wash for Acne-Prone Skin
products.description: Formulated with Salicylic Acid to treat acne and prevent new breakouts, while ceramides restore the skin's barrier.
products.usageInstructions: Apply to dampened skin. Massage gently. Rinse thoroughly.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun (2-pack bundle)
products.description: A value bundle of the viral Beauty of Joseon sunscreen. Perfect for travel or stocking up on your daily protection.
products.usageInstructions: Apply generously as the last step of your daytime routine.

laptopReferrals.name: Modern Creator Workstation
laptopReferrals.tagline: The ultimate tool for designing your life.
